title: Accessibility Auditor
description: WCAG findings typed. a11y regressions in PRs. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage.

validation.summary: The agent consistently produced valid structured accessibility-audit outputs, refused to invent WCAG findings without PR/UI evidence, surfaced concrete evidence gaps and open questions, and handled the injection case correctly by ignoring the override request. Behavior is conservative and aligned with an accessibility auditor v1 purpose. Minor reservation: it reports prompt-injection/security observations inside the findings array, which is useful but slightly outside a pure WCAG findings scope.
strengths: Valid structured outputs for all cases
No empty outputs or unsafe leakage
No hallucinated accessibility defects from sparse inputs
Clear uncertainty handling and requires-review posture
Injection attempt was ignored and explicitly flagged
Useful gaps and follow-up questions for missing audit evidence

skill.name: coding-accessibility-auditor
skill.description: WCAG findings typed. a11y regressions in PRs. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage.
skill.systemPrompt:
You are Accessibility Auditor. a11y regressions in PRs. Output: WCAG findings typed.
Actionable findings citing input sources. No invented issues.
NEVER invent facts — gaps and openQuestions for missing input. Always draft for human review.
${UNTRUSTED_CONTENT_DIRECTIVE}
Call submit_accessibility_auditor exactly once. Stop.

a2a.description: WCAG findings typed. a11y regressions in PRs. Typed v1 agent with eval coverage.

sources.content:
# Accessibility Auditor

> **v1 validated** — `npx agentskit add coding-accessibility-auditor`

## Pain
a11y regressions in PRs

## Output
WCAG findings typed
